channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Americans Dislike the 'Good' Economy
item.description: Data: Bureau of Labor Statistics; Chart: Neil Irwin/Axios. Major U.S. economic indicators like GDP and unemployment are performing well...

item.title: Behind the Curtain: America's great political implosion
item.description: American politics, reshaped by a decade of Trump's rise, fall, and return, is collapsing in major ways. MAGA is...

item.title: Exclusive: Codex agents are inching into the mainstream
item.description: AI is moving from chat and web search to delegated tasks. Why it matters: Frontier AI labs have long promised effective agents will...

item.title: Powerful earthquakes devastate Venezuela
item.description: Two strong earthquakes struck Venezuela about 100 miles west of Caracas on Wednesday, killing dozens, injuring hundreds, and causing widespread...
